title: Be able to move the placement of views so they act like movable "tabs"
excerpt: Be able to move the placement of views so they act like movable “tabs”. Nothing to add

posts.author: LoveMonday (Michael Sidhom)
posts.cookedHtml: Be able to move the placement of views so they act like movable “tabs”. Nothing to add

posts.author: Brianne (Brianne Hansen)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree! I have to delete and remake views in the right order for this to work. I expected to be able to click and drag

posts.author: Admeirel (Adolpho Meirelles)
posts.cookedHtml: So needed!! Tired of having to delete views to make them in the correct order!

posts.author: fabiozampieri (fabio zampieri)
posts.cookedHtml: very useful! i use the preferred star to move them!
